title: Famibay Artificial Eucalyptus and Willow Garland 6.5Ft Green Eucalyptus Garland Artificial Plant Table Runner Fake Hanging Vine Leaves for Wedding Wall Arch Home Decor (1Pcs)
features: {Specification}:1 Pieces Blended artificial eucalyptus and willow leaves garland per bag.This artificial vine greenery garland is 6.5 feet in length approx. Decorating wedding arch backdrop stand home wall vivid and vibrant

{Material}:Blended faux silver dollar eucalyptus and willow garland are made of silk green leaves and plastic stems.No wilt,no color fading,no falling,fresh-looking and durable.In addition,due to transportation, the artificial garland are packed in spiral status. I When you receive it,just shake slightly and adjust manually or hanging it for several days, it would restore natural status

{DIY Based on Your Request}:Wrapped fake eucalyptus and willow vines together to make the eucalyptus garland wreath;Put them on table as table runner vine;Place them along a banister or a mantel for a lovely display

{Enjoy Beautiful Scenery}:Realistic blended faux eucalyptus vine faux willow garland for outdoor ,elegant and vibrantly colored,Put these plants garland nearby walkway, pathway, staircase,garden ,window box and so on.The artificial greenery eucalyptus leaves could bring the forest straight to your home

{Suitable for Anywhere Decorate}:Green plants eucalyptus vine with willow leaves is a perfect hanging plants over doorways,on tables,as weddings swag or table runner,also be used in office, restaurant,cafe,birthday party,dorm,backdrop arch wall decor and so on.As a home decor, practical and durable,easy to clean when dirty,wipe clean, just like new fresh plants, making fresh atmosphere.IF ANY PROBLEM WITH THIS GARLAND, JUST CONTACT US FREELY
